Package neqsim.mcp.runners

Class SafetySystemPerformanceRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.SafetySystemPerformanceRunner
public final class SafetySystemPerformanceRunner extends Object
MCP runner for safety-system barrier performance analysis from JSON input.

The runner accepts an evidence-linked barrier register plus optional STID-derived demand cases, fire/gas detectors, cause-and-effect voting SIFs, and quantitative SIL/PFD SIF definitions. It returns the SafetySystemPerformanceReport together with extraction templates for agents reading C&E charts, SRS documents, firewater datasheets, detector layouts, and PFP schedules.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    • run

      public static String run(String json)
      Runs the safety-system performance analyzer from JSON.
      Parameters:
      json - JSON input with a register, demands, instruments, and optional SIF data
      Returns:
      JSON string with a safety-system performance report and templates
